request.user_text: 检测当前linux是否具有zip应用

operation.command: which zip 2>/dev/null || dpkg -s zip 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'Status: install ok installed' && echo 'zip is installed' || echo 'zip is not installed'

risk.reason: LLM assessed: Command checks if zip is installed using which and dpkg, then echoes a status message. No system modification or destructive action.
risk.llm_reason: Command checks if zip is installed using which and dpkg, then echoes a status message. No system modification or destructive action.
